G

GameController - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
Controller for game-view.fxml.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
GameController.ShotClickAdapter - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
Reacts to a click on the opponent board: fires the human shot there
GamePersistenceManager - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence
Handles all read and write operations for Battle Shi's two persistence files: Binary save file (battleshi_save.dat) — a Java serialized GameSession written to the user's home directory.
GamePersistenceManager() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence.GamePersistenceManager
 
gameSession - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
GameSession - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Serializable snapshot of a complete, in-progress Battle Shi match.
GameSession(HumanPlayer, MachinePlayer, GameState, boolean) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
Creates a new session from the two players, the starting state, and the starting turn.
gameState - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
 
GameState - Enum Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums
Represents the overall phase the current match is in.
GameState() - Constructor for enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.GameState

getCellOrigin(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
Computes the top-left position of a cell's full logical square (ignoring the cosmetic inset), relative to the overlay layer.
